query: Florida 2026 gubernatorial GOP primary debate schedule Byron Donalds James Fishback David Jolly - any debates scheduled or held summer 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

**Direct answer:** No formal/sanctioned GOP primary debate involving Donalds, Fishback, and Jolly was scheduled or held in summer 2026. Key findings:

- **Multiple summer debates were CANCELED:** the RPOF party-run June debate (only Donalds qualified), a CBS debate (~June 24), and a Fox 13 Tampa debate set for July 21.
- **One unofficial online debate WAS held** on July 2, 2026 (YouTube, moderated by podcast host Patrick Bet-David), featuring Jay Collins, James Fishback, and Paul Renner — but **not frontrunner Byron Donalds**, who declined all debates citing his lead (~40-60% polling, ~$81-100M raised).
- **David Jolly is the leading Democratic candidate**, never a GOP-primary debate participant.
- **Next scheduled debates are general-election events in October 2026:** Senate on Oct 13, Governor on Oct 15, both at FAU Boca Raton (requiring ≥12.5% in a September Mason-Dixon poll to qualify).
- Primary: Aug 18, 2026; General: Nov 3, 2026.

Full findings, sources, and data points have been submitted via the StructuredOutput tool.

sources.title: If Florida's GOP debate for governor has no Byron Donalds, does it count?

sources.title: 2026 Florida gubernatorial election
sources.snippet: Overview of the 2026 Florida gubernatorial race, candidates, and primary date.

key_facts: No officially sanctioned Florida GOP gubernatorial primary debate has been held as of mid-July 2026; the Republican Party of Florida canceled its planned June party-run debate.
The RPOF debate was canceled because only Byron Donalds met qualification criteria reportedly requiring >=10% in an official party poll, >$10 million raised, and >10,000 donors.
A CBS-planned debate (~June 24, 2026) was canceled after a majority of GOP candidates declined to participate.
A proposed Fox 13 (Tampa) debate scheduled for July 21, 2026 was canceled (announced ~June 25, 2026 by Paul Renner).

An unofficial online debate titled 'The Future of Florida live debate' was held July 2, 2026 on YouTube, moderated by podcast host Patrick Bet-David, featuring Jay Collins, James Fishback, and Paul Renner.
Byron Donalds skipped all debates, citing his frontrunner status (polling ~40-60%, raised ~$81-100M) and saying he would only debate once a rival reached double digits.
David Jolly is the leading DEMOCRATIC candidate, not a participant in Republican primary debates.
Two official general-election debates are scheduled for October 2026: Senate on Oct 13 and Governor on Oct 15, both 7-8 p.m. ET at FAU Boca Raton via the nonpartisan 'Before YOU Vote' partnership.
October general-election debate participants must reach >=12.5% in a September Mason-Dixon poll to qualify.
The Florida primary is August 18, 2026; the general election is November 3, 2026.

data_points.metric: Online GOP debate (Collins, Fishback, Renner; Donalds absent) date

data_points.unit: percent support in official party poll

data_points.metric: October general-election debate polling qualification threshold
Byron Donalds reported campaign fundraising (approx, lower bound)
